title: campanula × digenea
intro: Campanula × digenea, also known as Bellflower, is a hybrid plant species within the Campanulaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Campanula × digenea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
